jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at DeHaat
jsonLd.description:
DeHaat invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Aurangabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DeHaat:
DeHaat is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DeHaat!
